descFull: Learn from your vibe coding instead of just clicking Accept. AhaDiff turns each AI diff into a code-verified lesson, quiz, and review. · 别再无脑 vibe coding 啦！让你从 vibe coding 中学到真东西。每次改动都变成能查证的课程、测验和复习。
